allow:
Bash(git -C /Volumes/HubData/Projects/terminal/GoodTerm commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor settings to modern 3-level navigation with SettingsUI module

Created new Foundation/SettingsUI shared module with:
- NavigationSplitView master-detail layout for all platforms
- Left sidebar: categorized settings items list
- Right panel: detail content for selected item
- Unified iOS/macOS experience with proper platform adaptation

Key changes:
- Added SettingsUI package with models and views
- Implemented MonitorTelemetryManager for server monitoring
- Refactored both Rayon and mRayon setting views
- 3-level structure: App sidebar → Settings list → Detail view
- Improved navigation and layout consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Volumes/HubData/Projects/terminal/GoodTerm commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Modernize settings layout with Form and 3-level navigation

Updated settings UI to match Xcode and macOS design standards:
- Changed from ScrollView to Form container for native layout
- Applied .formStyle\(.grouped\) for proper section grouping
- Simplified to clean 3-level structure:
  Level 1: App sidebar \(Connect, Machine, Settings...\)
  Level 2: Settings categories \(About, Appearance, Premium...\)
  Level 3: Detail view showing all sections for selected category
- Left panel shows category list, right panel shows category content
- Each setting item displayed as independent section with full details
- Matches Apple HIG guidelines for macOS settings interfaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
